pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.1 to support Java 21 and Jakarta EE namespace.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21 as a baseline and uses javax.* namespaces; Spring Boot 3.x is required for Java 21 compatibility and Jakarta EE 9+.
The project targets Java 21, so the source/target compatibility must be updated to avoid compilation errors or runtime incompatibilities.

pom.xml.general_idea: Migrate validation API from javax.validation to jakarta.validation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x uses Jakarta EE 9+ namespaces; javax.validation classes are no longer available, causing compile errors.
Spring Cloud 2020.x is incompatible with Spring Boot 3.x; using it would cause dependency resolution failures or runtime class conflicts.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Cloud Starter version to 4.1.3.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Cloud Starter 3.x is incompatible with Spring Boot 3.x; requires 4.x for compatibility.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Netflix Eureka Client version to 4.1.3.
pom.xml.why_exists: Eureka Client 3.x is incompatible with Spring Cloud 2023.x/Spring Boot 3.x; requires 4.x for compatibility.
Spring Kafka 2.x is incompatible with Spring Boot 3.x; requires 3.x for compatibility.
JAXB 3.x uses javax.* namespaces; JAXB 4.x uses jakarta.* namespaces required by Spring Boot 3.x.
Liquibase 4.2.2 may have compatibility issues with Spring Boot 3.x drivers or Jakarta namespaces; 4.28.0 is the compatible version.
Ehcache 3.9.0 may have compatibility issues with Spring Boot 3.x; 3.10.8 is the compatible version.
Springdoc 1.5.3 uses javax.* namespaces; 1.8.0 uses jakarta.* namespaces required by Spring Boot 3.x.
